general.name: Default Plan - Jamf Protect Configuration
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>4cb55e4e-f9e9-4ed9-84e9-a05630e5a9a3</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>com.jamf.protect.4cb55e4e-f9e9-4ed9-84e9-a05630e5a9a3</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Default Plan - Jamf Protect Configuration</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Protect Certificates and PPPC Configuration Plans</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>6c546977-ffb4-46ce-a892-e40f572bc739</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.root</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>6c546977-ffb4-46ce-a892-e40f572bc739</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Protect Root CA</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>CA Certificate for Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>rootCA.der</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>8990b57c-2868-4c0b-9586-66ac95af8a4d</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.pkcs12</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>8990b57c-2868-4c0b-9586-66ac95af8a4d</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Protect CSR</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>CSR for Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>csr.p12</string><key>Password</key><string>gameplan</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>2c4d6471-6902-4130-aa21-4ca42b1fb8c0</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.pkcs12</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>2c4d6471-6902-4130-aa21-4ca42b1fb8c0</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Websocket Authentication Certificate</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Certificate for Jamf Protect to be able to communicate over websockets</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>iotCustomAuthPrivateKey.p12</string><key>Password</key><string>gameplan</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>e222a45d-0c05-44be-95e5-940879f40962</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.system-extension-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>e222a45d-0c05-44be-95e5-940879f40962</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Protect System Extension</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Protect System Extension</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>AllowUserOverrides</key><true/><key>AllowedSystemExtensions</key><dict><key>483DWKW443</key><array><string>com.jamf.protect.security-extension</string></array></dict><key>RemovableSystemExtensions</key><dict><key>483DWKW443</key><array><string>com.jamf.protect.security-extension</string></array></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>a828e7ae-290e-4679-9554-f30e22fef62b</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.TCC.configuration-profile-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Jamf</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>a828e7ae-290e-4679-9554-f30e22fef62b</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Protect PPPC</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Protect PPPC</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>Services</key><dict><key>Accessibility</key><array><dict><key>Identifier</key><string>com.jamf.protect.daemon</string><key>CodeRequirement</key><string>anchor apple generic and identifier "com.jamf.protect.daemon" and (certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.9] /* exists */ or certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = "483DWKW443")</string><key>IdentifierType</key><string>bundleID</string><key>Allowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>Identifier</key><string>com.jamf.protect.security-extension</string><key>CodeRequirement</key><string>anchor
